response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matched. Discovered the correct songs performed ('青の朔日' by Kitani Tatsuya and 'Sarracenia' by SKY-HI). 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics in the reference were very incomplete; therefore, official lyrics for both songs were retrieved and manually transcribed to align with the performance. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual text for the song title card at 03:59.500, followed by highly synchronized audio-anchored subtitling for both song performances. Used instantaneous transitions (e.g., e-time of one sub block matches s-time of the next) to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: あなたのことだけは歌ってほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to sing of nothing but you,

subtitles.original: ならば私は戦える
subtitles.english: if so, then I can fight,

subtitles.original: たとえこの耳が聞こえないとしても
subtitles.english: even if these ears can no longer hear.

subtitles.original: 思い馳せなくなっていた
subtitles.english: I had stopped letting my thoughts wander,

subtitles.original: 虹を覚えてる空には
subtitles.english: to the sky that still remembers the rainbow,

subtitles.original: くたびれた靴が響くよ
subtitles.english: but the sound of worn-out shoes echoes.

subtitles.original: それでも歩いていると
subtitles.english: Even so, as I keep walking,

subtitles.original: 掴もうとしてすり抜けた
subtitles.english: the words that slipped away as I tried to grasp them...

subtitles.original: 言葉、忘れない手のひら
subtitles.english: I won't forget them in the palm of my hand.

subtitles.original: 指を二つにして隠した
subtitles.english: Crossing my fingers to hide the magic

subtitles.original: 強さに変える魔法を
subtitles.english: that turns them into strength.

subtitles.original: あぁ、どれだけ息をしたら
subtitles.english: Ah, how many breaths must I take

subtitles.original: 「これでよかった」と思える？
subtitles.english: before I can believe it was all for the best?

subtitles.original: 心がずっと砕けながら
subtitles.english: Even as my heart is constantly shattered,

subtitles.original: 欠片の全部で動いてる
subtitles.english: it moves with every single one of its pieces.

subtitles.original: これはきっと帰り道
subtitles.english: This is surely the road back home.

subtitles.original: あの日と同じじゃなくていい
subtitles.english: It doesn't have to be the same as that day.

subtitles.original: ただもう一度だけ会いたい
subtitles.english: I just want to meet you one more time.

subtitles.original: 何も怖くはない
subtitles.english: I am not afraid of anything anymore.

subtitles.original: 泣かないでって祈るのは
subtitles.english: Praying "please don't cry" are

subtitles.original: 足元の明日の涙
subtitles.english: the tears of tomorrow at my feet.

subtitles.original: 迷いを乗せた爪先で
subtitles.english: With toes carrying my doubts,

subtitles.original: 進め、進め、魂ごと
subtitles.english: move forward, move forward, along with my soul!

subtitles.original: 正しいかどうか、なんてことよりも
subtitles.english: Rather than whether it's right or wrong,

subtitles.original: あなたのいる世界が笑ってほしい
subtitles.english: I want the world you live in to smile.

subtitles.original: だから私は生きている
subtitles.english: That is why I am living,

subtitles.original: 時計の針にも奪えない力を
subtitles.english: with a power that not even the hands of time can steal.

subtitles.original: 不意に会った宝物が
subtitles.english: The shadows cast by the treasures

subtitles.original: 落とす影、まだ探してる
subtitles.english: I met by chance... I'm still searching.

subtitles.original: あぁ、もう一度だけ会いたい
subtitles.english: Ah, I just want to meet you one more time.

subtitles.original: 何も怖くはない
subtitles.english: I am not afraid of anything anymore.

subtitles.original: 命は理由に出会えた
subtitles.english: My life has found its reason.

subtitles.original: 燃えて消える意味を知った
subtitles.english: I've learned the meaning of burning away.

subtitles.original: その陽が視界を照らした
subtitles.english: That light illuminated my vision,

subtitles.original: 青く、青く、どこまでも
subtitles.english: blue, blue, endlessly.

subtitles.original: 明日がすべてを失っても
subtitles.english: Even if tomorrow loses everything,

subtitles.original: 繋いだことだけは歌ってほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to sing of nothing but our connection.

subtitles.original: だから私は生きている
subtitles.english: That is why I am living,

subtitles.original: 欠片の全部で、永遠
subtitles.english: with every piece of me, for eternity.

subtitles.original: 泣かないでって祈るのは
subtitles.english: Praying "please don't cry" are

subtitles.original: 足元の明日の涙
subtitles.english: the tears of tomorrow at my feet.

subtitles.original: 迷いを乗せた爪先で
subtitles.english: With toes carrying my doubts,

subtitles.original: 進め、進め、魂ごと
subtitles.english: move forward, move forward, along with my soul!

subtitles.original: 間違いかどうか、なんてことよりも
subtitles.english: Rather than whether it's a mistake or not,

subtitles.original: あなたのいる世界が続いてほしい
subtitles.english: I want the world you live in to continue.

subtitles.original: ならば私は戦える
subtitles.english: If so, then I can fight,

subtitles.original: たとえその時、傍にいなかったとしても
subtitles.english: even if I am not by your side at that time.

subtitles.original: Sarracenia
subtitles.english: [Song: Sarracenia]

subtitles.original: この地球上すべてのゲームが上の空かい？
subtitles.english: Is every game on this Earth just a distraction?

subtitles.original: 半端な格好で臨むなよ坊や
subtitles.english: Don't approach with a half-hearted attitude, boy.

subtitles.original: リアルなビースト気取りのプリマドンナ
subtitles.english: Real beasts posing as primadonnas...

subtitles.original: フッ、話になんねぇ
subtitles.english: Hah, you're not even worth talking to.

subtitles.original: 何でそんなに自信があるんですか？
subtitles.english: Why are you so confident?

subtitles.original: 骨の髄まで負けた結果が当たり前じゃん
subtitles.english: The result of losing to the bone is obvious, right?

subtitles.original: ジャマなビースト気取りの皮肉屋
subtitles.english: An annoying beast posing as a cynic...

subtitles.original: フッ、話になんねぇ
subtitles.english: Hah, you're not even worth talking to.

subtitles.original: 多くを喰らえ
subtitles.english: Eat a lot,

subtitles.original: 胃袋を肥え
subtitles.english: fatten your stomach.

subtitles.original: 目に物見せてきな 味わい尽くせ
subtitles.english: Show them what you've got, savour it to the fullest!

subtitles.original: 飢え、雨、まどろみ
subtitles.english: Hunger, rain, slumber...

subtitles.original: 思い描いてどうしたい？
subtitles.english: What do you want to do with what you pictured?

subtitles.original: ただ手にする代わりは幾らですか？
subtitles.english: What is the price of just getting it?

subtitles.original: 憂うな、超えろ
subtitles.english: Do not grieve, overcome it!

subtitles.original: そこから上を向けよ
subtitles.english: Look up from there!

subtitles.original: リアルに飢えろ、飢えろ、ねぇ
subtitles.english: Really starve, starve! Hey,

subtitles.original: もっとここまで来いよ
subtitles.english: come further up here!

subtitles.original: 噛み堪え、噛み堪え
subtitles.english: Bite and endure, bite and endure!

subtitles.original: 噛み堪え、噛み堪え
subtitles.english: Bite and endure, bite and endure!
